case_title: BERNADETTE ALVAREZ VS. FIRST FEDERAL BANK OF CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-06-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

LAW AND MOTION, 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS FIRST FEDERAL BANK OF CALIFORNIA AND SEASIDE FINANCIAL CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON OCT. 14, 2008. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 301/PJB
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-30-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
